title: Curated ASD/ACSC cyber reference catalogue for PSPF
attribution: Australian Signals Directorate / Australian Cyber Security Centre

functions.title: Govern
functions.summary: Cyber security governance, risk ownership, policy, accountability and assurance expectations drawn from the ISM Cyber Security Principles.

functions.title: Protect
functions.summary: Protective cyber controls that reduce exposure, enforce secure configuration, strengthen identities, manage vulnerabilities and ensure trustworthy software.

functions.title: Detect
functions.summary: Detection, logging, monitoring and visibility principles that support timely discovery and investigation of cyber security events.

functions.title: Respond
functions.summary: Incident response, recovery and resilience principles that support coordinated action during and after cyber security incidents.

mitigationStrategies.title: Application control
mitigationStrategies.summary: Permit only approved applications to execute, reducing unauthorised code execution risk.

mitigationStrategies.title: Patch applications
mitigationStrategies.summary: Apply application patches quickly to reduce exploitation of known vulnerabilities.

mitigationStrategies.title: Configure Microsoft Office macros
mitigationStrategies.summary: Constrain Microsoft Office macro execution to reduce malicious macro compromise paths.

mitigationStrategies.title: User application hardening
mitigationStrategies.summary: Harden user applications by disabling risky functionality and reducing exposed attack surface.

mitigationStrategies.title: Restrict administrative privileges
mitigationStrategies.summary: Limit, control and monitor privileged access to reduce the impact of compromised accounts.

mitigationStrategies.title: Patch operating systems
mitigationStrategies.summary: Apply operating system patches quickly to reduce exploitation of known vulnerabilities.

mitigationStrategies.title: Multi-factor authentication
mitigationStrategies.summary: Use multi-factor authentication to make unauthorised access materially harder.

mitigationStrategies.title: Regular backups
mitigationStrategies.summary: Maintain and test backups so critical data and systems can be restored after disruption or compromise.

mitigationStrategies.title: Remaining mitigation strategies
mitigationStrategies.summary: Consider and implement remaining mitigation strategies where required to achieve an acceptable residual risk position.

guidanceFrameworks.title: ISM Cyber Security Principles
guidanceFrameworks.summary: ASD/ACSC principles that organise cyber security outcomes across governance, protection, detection and response expectations.

guidanceFrameworks.title: Essential Eight maturity model and ISM mapping
guidanceFrameworks.summary: ASD/ACSC mapping between the Essential Eight maturity model and supporting ISM controls.

guidanceFrameworks.title: Blueprint for Secure Cloud
guidanceFrameworks.summary: ASD/ACSC secure cloud guidance for designing, configuring and operating cloud services with stronger baseline assurance.

guidanceFrameworks.title: Gateway Security Guidance Package
guidanceFrameworks.summary: ASD/ACSC guidance for gateway security and Security Service Edge-aligned controls relevant to Australian Government connectivity.

guidanceFrameworks.title: Modern Defensible Architecture
guidanceFrameworks.summary: ASD/ACSC secure-by-design guidance for resilient, defensible enterprise architecture.

guidanceFrameworks.title: Strategies to Mitigate Cyber Security Incidents
guidanceFrameworks.summary: ASD/ACSC mitigation strategies that reduce the likelihood and impact of common cyber security incidents.

controlThemes.title: Trustworthy Software
controlThemes.summary: Controls that contribute to supported, verified and authorised software execution and secure software supply, design and maintenance.

controlThemes.title: Secure Configuration Management
controlThemes.summary: Controls that contribute to approved baselines, hardened configurations, controlled change and continuous configuration enforcement.
